content.text:
<plugin_info kind="matched_installed">
display_name: Neon Postgres
description: Manage your Neon projects and databases with the neon-postgres agent skill and the Neon MCP Server
mcp_servers:
  - neon
</plugin_info>
<user_query>
Run the full AGENTS.md memory update flow for workspace `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-one`.

## Paths
- AGENTS.md: `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-one/AGENTS.md`
- Incremental index: `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-one/.cursor/hooks/state/continual-learning-index.json`
- Transcripts dir: `/Users/duhl/.cursor/projects/Users-duhl-git-anedot-one/agent-transcripts/`

## Incremental processing rules
1. Read existing AGENTS.md first.
2. Load the index file if present.
3. Only inspect **parent** transcript `*.jsonl` files (not under `subagents/`) that are either:
   - not in the index, OR
   - have filesystem mtime (seconds * 1000 as mtimeMs) newer than the indexed `mtimeMs`
4. After processing, refresh index mtimes for all parent transcripts that exist, remove index entries for deleted transcript files, and write the updated index JSON.

## Transcripts likely needing processing (verify with stat)
These parent transcripts appear new or updated since last index run:
- `ce1b16f4-d9ef-4a00-8507-0bd0cdf462e8/ce1b16f4-d9ef-4a00-8507-0bd0cdf462e8.jsonl` (indexed mtime older than file)
- `7b2dee70-c530-49be-bef0-ef9230084ac6/7b2dee70-c530-49be-bef0-ef9230084ac6.jsonl` (not in index)
- `be2b970c-3070-4d55-af78-eb359d4e0176/be2b970c-3070-4d55-af78-eb359d4e0176.jsonl` (not in index; current session about Neon feature branches, CI cleanup, staging reset with old/staging-timestamp)

## AGENTS.md update rules
- Update only for **high-signal recurring** user corrections and **durable workspace facts**
- Exclude one-off/transient details and secrets
- Keep only sections: `## Learned User Preferences`, `## Learned Workspace Facts` (and existing `## Neon` section if present—merge Neon facts into Workspace Facts or keep Neon section if already there)
- Max 12 bullets per learned section; dedupe; update in place when possible
- Plain bullets only; no metadata blocks

## Current AGENTS.md Neon facts (may need correction)
Existing bullet says `dev/<git-branch-name>` for local dev; recent work established `feature/<git-branch-name>` via `pnpm db:branch`, CI deletes `feature/<branch>` on PR merge, staging reset preserves to `old/staging-<timestamp>`.

## Output to parent
Return either:
1. Summary of AGENTS.md changes made (bullet list of what was added/updated), OR
2. Exactly: `No high-signal memory updates.` if no durable changes

Always refresh the index file even if AGENTS.md unchanged.

</user_query>

Running the memory update flow: reading AGENTS.md and the index, then processing new or updated parent transcripts.

[REDACTED]

input.command: for f in /Users/duhl/.cursor/projects/Users-duhl-git-anedot-one/agent-transcripts/*/*.jsonl; do [[ "$f" == *subagents* ]] && continue; stat -f '%m %N' "$f"; done | sort -rn
input.description: Get precise mtimes for all parent transcripts

content.text:
Updating AGENTS.md with corrected Neon branch conventions and refreshing the index.

[REDACTED]

input.old_string: - Each pull request should get its own **preview** Cloudflare worker deploy and Neon database branch.
input.new_string: - Each pull request should get its own **preview** Cloudflare worker deploy (`api-preview-<slug>`, `web-preview-<slug>`) and Neon branch `preview/<head-ref>`.

input.old_string:
- `.github/workflows/deploy.yml`: push to `master` deploys staging; production only via manual `workflow_dispatch` selecting `production` from `master`.
- Neon databases: `prod` (production data), `staging` (child of prod, refreshed on master merge), `dev/<git-branch-name>` (child of staging, local dev), `preview/<git-branch-name>` branches for PR previews.
input.new_string:
- `.github/workflows/deploy.yml`: push to `master` resets Neon `staging` from `prod` (`.github/scripts/reset-staging-branch.sh`), runs migrations, then deploys staging Workers; production only via manual `workflow_dispatch` selecting `production` from `master`.
- Neon branches: `prod` (production); `staging` (child of `prod`); prior `staging` and children preserved as `old/staging-<UTC-timestamp>` on each master reset (unique per reset, never deleted); `feature/<git-branch>` for local dev (`pnpm db:branch`, parent `staging`, 7-day expiry); `preview/<head-ref>` for PR previews (parent `staging`).
- PR merge cleanup (`.github/workflows/cleanup-preview.yml`): deletes `preview/<head-ref>` and preview Workers on PR close; deletes `feature/<head-ref>` when the PR merges to `master`.

input.final_summary: Updated AGENTS.md with corrected Neon branch naming (`feature/*` local dev, `old/staging-<timestamp>` preservation, CI cleanup rules) and refreshed the continual-learning index for all 12 parent transcripts.

content.text:
Processed 3 transcripts (`be2b970c`, `7b2dee70`, `ce1b16f4`) and refreshed the index for all 12 parent transcripts.

### AGENTS.md changes

**Learned User Preferences**
- **Updated:** PR preview bullet now names dedicated Workers (`api-preview-<slug>`, `web-preview-<slug>`) and Neon branch `preview/<head-ref>`.

**Learned Workspace Facts**
- **Updated:** `deploy.yml` bullet — master push resets Neon `staging` from `prod` via `reset-staging-branch.sh`, runs migrations, then deploys staging.
- **Replaced:** `dev/<git-branch-name>` Neon bullet with:
  - Branch hierarchy: `prod`, `staging`, `old/staging-<UTC-timestamp>` preservation (never deleted), `feature/<git-branch>` (local dev via `pnpm db:branch`, 7-day expiry), `preview/<head-ref>` (PR previews).
- **Added:** CI cleanup rules — `preview/*` + preview Workers on PR close; `feature/*` on PR merge to `master`.

**## Neon** — unchanged (CLI project default).

### Index maintenance
- Added `be2b970c` and `7b2dee70`
- Updated mtimes for all 12 parent transcripts
- No stale entries removed (all indexed files still exist)

[REDACTED]
